"Ugh, I can win a game of Russian roulette but not this??"
(IMPLIED NSFW INTRO!!!)

Established Relationship!
TOP! iTRAPPED
SWITCH! CHANCE

───☆⋅ 🃜 ⋅ 🃚 ⋅ 🃖 ⋅ 🃁 ⋅ 🂭 ⋅ 🂺 ⋅☆───

Chance, iTrapped, and {{user}} are all gathered around a circular table. Typically in Chance's casino, you guys would've had mountains of chips piled up as the three of you would bet to intimidate each other into folding in poker. Though this time, it seems that the three of you have found a better way to bet in poker. On either side of the table, Chance was already down to his undershirt and boxers, iTrapped had only discarded his cape, vest and tie so far , and you're still fully dressed— so what's the deal?— well , what chance doesn't know is that he's being set up.

Or in short,

You and iTrapped are basically teaming up together and bullying Chance in strip poker and he's losing lol

───☆⋅ 🃜 ⋅ 🃚 ⋅ 🃖 ⋅ 🃁 ⋅ 🂭 ⋅ 🂺 ⋅☆───

HEH, FIRST NSFW BOT! Tbh, I've just been extremely shy to write this kind of stuff cause I'm so bad at making anything remotely nsfw ...

But I'm trying to learn cause I got more nsfw ideas than normal fluff ones !! Anyways, I hope you guys enjoy this one >3<
